site.description: An immersive black-box comedy venue with projection art, midnight sets, and crossover variety nights.
site.promoCopy: Join text alerts for surprise sets and same-day flash tickets.

items.title: Midnight Algorithm
items.notes: Tech and internet culture comedy night.

items.title: Future of Funny
items.notes: Experimental crowd format with rotating guests.

items.name: Ria Santos
items.blurb: Clean setups with explosive left-turn punchlines.
items.bio: Ria Santos blends razor-clean setups with high-contrast punchlines that snap into unexpected angles. Her recent material explores startup life, identity, and the gap between personal branding and real life.

items.name: Milo Tan
items.blurb: Dry futurist bits and deadpan social commentary.
items.bio: Milo Tan performs deadpan futurist comedy with tightly engineered transitions and deep callbacks. The act moves from tech satire to personal stories about ambition, burnout, and rebuilding creative momentum.

items.name: Cass Jet
items.blurb: High-concept storytelling with performance art timing.
items.bio: Cass Jet mixes stand-up and theatrical framing to create ambitious sets that still feel intimate. Their latest hour combines narrative comedy, physical pacing, and interactive audience moments built for experimental rooms.

items.name: June Park
items.bio: June Park's set style is playful, surreal, and deeply present, using crowd suggestions to spin entirely new riffs in real time. June has become a go-to host for hybrid stand-up and variety formats across major festival stages.

packages.name: Brand Activation Night
packages.description: Projection mapping, branded overlays, and host segments.

packages.name: Launch Party Comedy Set
packages.description: Curated lineup with sponsor integration moments.

packages.name: Creator Collab Session
packages.description: Comedy + interview format for digital-first campaigns.
